headline: NASA launched an emergency mission to stop the Swift Observatory from crashing to Earth
summary: NASA launched an emergency mission to save the Swift Observatory. The 2004 spacecraft is dangerously lowering its orbit due to solar storms. Katalyst Space Technologies' Link spacecraft will attempt to intercept and prevent its demise.

headline: White House deletes thousands of web pages about energy conservation as heatwave slams US
summary: The US Department of Energy deleted roughly 6,000 energy conservation pages. This deletion coincided with a historic heatwave across the US. It followed Republican backlash over energy-saving advice, including setting AC to 78 degrees.

headline: Matic’s robot vacuum is getting a $250 price hike in September
summary: The Matic robot vacuum will see a $250 price increase soon. Its price will jump from $1,245 to $1,495 on September 9th. The company states the hike reflects new costs for the popular device.

headline: Flatbush Zombies’ Erick the Architect misses his BlackBerry keyboard
summary: Erick the Architect, producer for Flatbush Zombies, reflects on his career. He has collaborated with diverse artists from Joey Bada$$ to James Blake. Despite his success, he surprisingly misses his old BlackBerry keyboard.

headline: Exclusive: First Details and Trailer Revealed for BEYOND BORDERS Vol.1: EMERGE MODE MIKU, a New EP Featuring Hatsune Miku Singing With Grimes, slayr, and More
summary: IGN exclusively revealed details for 'BEYOND BORDERS Vol.1: EMERGE MODE MIKU.' The new EP features virtual singer Hatsune Miku in collaborations. Artists like Grimes, slayr, and Odetari are among the collaborators.

headline: Solo Leveling: Beyond the System Movie Announced at Anime Expo
summary: The popular anime series 'Solo Leveling' is getting a movie adaptation. Titled 'Solo Leveling: Beyond the System,' it will continue the story. The announcement was made at Anime Expo, thrilling fans.

headline: Young Washington Review
summary: 'Young Washington' is reviewed as an earnest but limited exploration. It chronicles George Washington's early military career as a British officer. While interesting for enthusiasts, it falls short of a truly epic chronicle.

headline: First Look at Ghost of Tsushima Legends Anime Character Art
summary: A first look at 'Ghost of Tsushima Legends' anime character art has been revealed. The art offers a new stylistic take on the game's popular characters. Fans can now see their favorite legends in a fresh, animated style.

headline: US marks its 250th birthday with fireworks, flyovers and extreme weather
summary: The US celebrated its 250th birthday with a mix of events. Festivities included fireworks displays and ceremonial flyovers. President Trump's speech honored veterans and American history, alongside political messages.

headline: Tuchel praises respectful Mexico fans amid increased security
summary: Thomas Tuchel praised Mexico fans for their friendly and respectful conduct. He dismissed security concerns regarding England's treatment in Mexico. Tuchel noted the atmosphere was 'nicer than I expected' despite heightened security.

headline: Farage denies rules broken after reports benefits from ally were not declared
summary: Nigel Farage denies breaking rules regarding undeclared benefits. The Sunday Times reported he failed to register support from an ally. The ally had previously been convicted of fraud in the US.

headline: Watch: Lyse Doucet in Tehran as huge funeral for Iran's former supreme leader takes place
summary: A massive funeral is underway for Iran's former supreme leader. Lyse Doucet is reporting live from Tehran on the unfolding event. Authorities anticipate up to 20 million attendees across Iran and Iraq.
